name: Fall Feast- Pavlova
recipeInstructions:
1. Top this dessert with ripe fall fruit or your choice.
2. Preheat oven to 275°F (140°C).
3. Line a large cookie sheet with parchment paper.
4. In an electric mixer, beat egg whites and salt until soft peaks form.
5. Gradually add sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Add vinegar and heat the mixture until thick, glossy, and stiff enough to support the beater.
7. Mound the meringue onto a cookie sheet in an 8-inch circle.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes. The meringue should be cream-colored and crisp. If the outside is still sticky, bake another 15 minutes.
9. Cool and remove from paper onto a serving plate.
10. In a large bowl, beat whipping cream until soft peaks form.
11. Cover the meringue with cream and decorate with fruit.
